publicationType: author profile and machine-readable entity graph
applicableChecks: 152-ФЗ: no private contact or sensitive personal data added; only public professional identity links are used
38-ФЗ: no paid advertising claim, promo marking or commercial endorsement is introduced
436-ФЗ: public professional profile is age-neutral; site media registry already uses 16+ where applicable
СМИ / сетевое издание: no false claim of registered media status is introduced
Copyright: existing portrait asset is reused; no new third-party media is imported
SEO integrity: no hidden keyword stuffing or invisible public text is added
riskFlags: identity-linking depends on external profile URLs staying stable
Yandex Services and MSU Istina text must be synchronized later through visual access
followUpRule: When any external profile or public author name changes, update author page, person.json, llms.txt, sitemap, Timepad speaker block and Moonn entity bridge in one pass.
